sourceAmbiguity: A successful webhook delivery does not prove provider authenticity or replay safety.
decisionTaken: Every provider family requires signature verification and a 300 second replay/idempotency posture before normalization.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Phase 0 exact-once and Phase 2 edge controls require signed callback admission and duplicate/collision handling.
operationalRisk: Unsigned callbacks can spoof delivery, call, or recording outcomes and poison downstream patient-visible state.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Tighten per-provider replay windows when measured clock skew and provider retry behavior are available.
